name: Heal
description: Staff imbued with healing magic that recovers an ally's HP.

name: Mend
description: Staff imbued with healing magic. Recovers a great deal of an ally's HP.

name: Physic
description: Staff imbued with healing magic. Can recover an ally's HP at a distance.

name: Recover
description: Staff imbued with healing magic. Recovers vast amounts of an ally's HP.

name: Fortify
description: Staff imbued with healing magic that recovers HP for all allies within 5-space radius.

name: Freeze
description: Staff that prevents foes from moving for one turn.

name: Silence
description: Staff that prevents foes from using tomes or staves for one turn.

name: Fracture
description: Staff imbued with magic that can break foes.

name: Nodus
description: Staff imbued with mysterious magic that sets all allies' Engage meters to max.

name: Recover (Celica)
description: Staff wielded by Emblem Celica that recovers a great deal of HP.

name: Fortify+ (Veronica)
description: Staff wielded by Emblem Veronica that heals HP and status effects within 7-space radius.
